name: Russian Black Bread #1 (Breadabm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and pour into a bakery bowl in the following order: water, vinegar, barley malt syrup, vegetable oil, sugar, salt, cocoa, dried onion, coffee granules, caraway seed, fennel.
2. Set "baking control" at 10 o'clock.
3. Select "white bread" mode and push Start.
4. In hot and humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water.
5. Tested in DAK R2D2. Sylvia's comments: Eat this hearty bread with soup and/or salad or serve it as an appetizer with a crab dip. You may substitute dark molasses for the barley malt syrup.
